hardened_backend_telemetry.p99_latency_profile: Stabilized under 1.2s via asyncio timeout guards

enforced_api_contracts: Global error boundaries emit bracketed custom exception logs: [VALIDATION_ERROR] and [TENANT_AUTH_ERROR]
POST /api/v1/procurement/ingest-history accepts multi-part form files and stages validated records in PostgreSQL
Track 1 gateway throttles emit [RATE_LIMIT_EXHAUSTED] at HTTP 429 for exhausted tenant or session windows

production_freeze.phase_registry: Phase 1 through Phase 8, Phase 11, and Deployment Track marked 100% COMPLETED
production_freeze.dead_code_sweep: core infra web/src raw print and console tracer scan clean
build_gates: python3 -m compileall main.py core/ infra/ scripts/ passed with zero warning or error trace
cd web && npm run build passed with zero warning or error trace

technical_debt_or_shortcuts: DEBT-005: main.py memory-backed sliding-window limiter is per API worker; replace with Redis-backed shared limiter before horizontally scaled public production rollout.
validation: Added dynamic port binding check to main.py and updated start commands to run main.py.
Configured shared backend URL resolver in web/src/lib/api.ts using NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL and dev fallback.
Replaced all hardcoded backend URL strings in Next.js page components with dynamic api.ts imports.
Created render.yaml cloud blueprint template declaring Postgres, backend container (with anomalies health check), and build-time env injected frontend container.
Confirmed backend structural compilation correctness using compileall.
Verified frontend type checking compiles cleanly via npx tsc --noEmit.
